title: NestJS Webpack Build
description: Build a NestJS application using webpack.

entryFile.description: Path to the main entry-point file, relative to project root.

tsConfigFile.description: Path to the TypeScript configuration file, relative to project root.

outputPath.description: Output directory path, relative to workspace root.

assets.description: List of static assets to copy.

workers.description: Worker entry points. Each produces a self-contained, minified [name].js bundle.

entryPath.description: Path to the worker entry file. './' paths are relative to project root, otherwise relative to workspace root.

additionalEntryPoints.description: Additional webpack entry points (deprecated, use 'workers' instead).

runtimeDependencies.description: Runtime dependencies to include in generated package.json.

ormConfigPath.description: Path to ormconfig.ts relative to project root. Auto-detected from src/ormconfig.ts if not specified.

migrationsDir.description: Path to migrations directory relative to project root.

memoryLimit.description: Memory limit in MB for TypeScript type checker.

orgScopes.description: Patterns to bundle rather than externalize. Supports 4 modes: org scope ('@myorg' → @myorg/*), prefix ('@myorg/prefix' → @myorg/prefix*), regex ('/^pattern/' → custom regex), exact package name ('lodash' → lodash and lodash/subpath).

bundlePackages.description: Explicit package names to force-bundle into the output instead of externalizing (e.g. ['lodash', 'my-pkg']).

nodeExternalsConfig.description: Override options for webpack-node-externals. Merged with defaults — allowlist entries are appended to orgScopes and bundlePackages.

allowlist.description: Additional patterns to allowlist (bundle instead of externalize).

additionalModuleDirs.description: Additional directories to scan for modules to externalize.

importType.description: Module import type for externalized packages (default: 'commonjs').

webpackConfigPath.description: Path to a JS/TS file (relative to project root) that exports a (config) => config function for custom webpack overrides.
